since_last: 45% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.63%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.20% · BTC +0.99% · Gold -0.18% · Nasdaq100 +0.24%. 45% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.63%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.63%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.90%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +16.61%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +16.61%, META +5.77%, NVDA +3.56%, UEC +3.40%, AI +2.72%. Laggards: RXRX -6.38%, S -5.46%, CRWD -5.41%, MDB -5.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.30% at $148.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.30% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
